news.title: UW–Madison doctoral student Jeong wins first place in national eBoard competition
news.summary_en: UW–Madison’s Tai Sun Jeong, a PhD student in the Quantitative Methods area in the School of Education’s Department of Educational Psychology, won first place in the 2026 Graduate Student eBoard Competition hosted by the Graduate Student Issues Committee at the National Council on Measurement in Education (NCME) Annual Meeting.

news.title: More than administrative support: How the Office of Research & Scholarship strengthens faculty research
news.summary_en: The charge of the Office of Research & Scholarship (ORS) is to equitably support the wide range of research and scholarship underway across the School of Education.

news.title: Fong Chan, distinguished UW–Madison scholar in rehabilitation counseling, dies
news.summary_en: Fong Chan, a professor emeritus at the University of Wisconsin–Madison and leading scholar in the field of rehabilitation counseling, has died.

news.title: UW–Madison’s Conroy publishes article in Voice and Speech Review
news.summary_en: UW–Madison’s Colleen Conroy, an assistant professor in the School of Education’s Department of Theatre and Drama, is the author of an article in Voice and Speech Review.

news.title: School of Education graduate receives Ginsberg Family Award
news.summary_en: Rathika Murali, who graduated in May 2026 from the School of Education, has received a 2026 Ginsberg Family Award from UW–Madison Student Affairs.

news.title: Department of Theatre and Drama recognized at American College Theatre Festival
news.summary_en: UW–Madison students and productions from the School of Education’s Department of Theatre and Drama received multiple honors at the American College Theatre Festival.
